_doc: Wallet species for gate/optimizer criteria routing. longshot: sub-50% game-WR with rare asymmetric wins is NORMAL — gate on avg/game + jackpot count, not WR. firehose: emits 100s of decisions/day, low copy-rate is the FILTERS WORKING — gate capture on capital+liquidity health only. grinder: steady high-WR — standard criteria. longhold: multi-day positions.
